Hook opt-outs — two easy wins

#2430 adds a global notification opt-out; #2574 makes the playground warner opt-in by detecting the actual CI gate. Toggle the inputs to see each hook's decision.

#2430 — ORK_NO_NOTIFY (desktop + sound)

#2574 — playground warner is opt-in by detection

Both survive plugin version bumps (env-based, not hooks.json edits). #2574 fixes the false "CI will reject your PR" claim in repos without the gate. Covered by 5 new unit tests on repoDefinesPlaygroundGate(). Also closes the already-shipped #2573 (ci-debug Pattern #11).
